name: Social Media Downloader
description: Download TikTok and Twitter/X videos without watermarks, extract MP3 audio, and save TikTok photo carousels — free, no sign-up, in your browser.

screenshots.label: Paste a TikTok or Twitter/X link to download video, audio, or slideshow images.

shortcuts.name: Download TikTok video

shortcuts.name: Download Twitter/X video
